assertions.assertion: Implements IExtensionGrantValidator with the GrantType set to 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange'
Extracts and validates the subject_token from the request
assertions.rationale: Extracts subject_token from context.Request.Raw.Get("subject_token"). Validation is done via JwtSecurityTokenHandler.ReadJwtToken (not the IS token validator, but it does extract and validate).

assertions.assertion: Returns a GrantValidationResult with a subject ID and custom claims array
assertions.rationale: Returns new GrantValidationResult(subject: subject, authenticationMethod: "token_exchange", claims: claims).

assertions.assertion: Registers the validator with AddExtensionGrantValidator<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
Mentions that IProfileService is called after the grant validator and can augment claims further
assertions.rationale: Does not mention IProfileService at all. Only mentions the grant validator and client configuration.
